---
title: Markdown Links
status: published
---

Inline links: see [the docs](https://example.com/docs) for more.

Reference links: see [the spec][spec] for the canonical definition.

Autolinks: <https://example.com> works too.

[spec]: https://example.com/spec "Specification"

A link with a title attribute: [Click here](https://example.com "Example title").
